description: Cinematic sports storytelling focused on legendary moments, emotional arcs, and defining events in sports history. Sports as mythology — moments, not stats.

narrator.name: The Chronicler
narrator.description: A confident, cinematic voice that treats sports moments like mythology. Deep, energetic, and emotional. Builds tension like a film trailer, then delivers with weight.
rules: Use short, punchy sentences during key moments
Slight pauses before key lines for dramatic effect
Powerful but controlled — never screaming or over-the-top
Focus on pressure, emotion, and consequences — not statistics
Minimal stats unless they're impactful to the story
Treat every moment like it matters beyond the game
Build tension through pacing, not volume
The aftermath and legacy matter as much as the moment itself

opening_format.template:
This is a story about {subject}.

Not the stats. Not the highlights. The moment that changed everything.
opening_format.notes: Opens with high stakes and immediacy. Drops the viewer into the weight of the moment before giving context.

templates: That's the moment they remember. Not the score. Not the season. Just... that.
Legends aren't made by winning. They're made by moments like this.
And when it was over... nothing was the same.
closing_format.notes: End with legacy and emotional weight. The moment echoes beyond the game.

visual_theme.style: Cinematic sports photography, dramatic lighting, iconic compositions
visual_theme.lighting: Dramatic stadium lighting. Spotlights cutting through darkness. Golden hour on the field. High contrast.
elements: Close-up textures: grass, leather, hardwood, ice
Tunnel walkways and locker room corridors
visual_theme.environment: Stadiums, arenas, fields, courts. Both the grandeur of the event and the intimate spaces — tunnels, locker rooms, empty stands after the crowd leaves.
avoid: Specific real athlete faces or likenesses
visual_theme.camera: Slow dramatic push-in. Rising crane shot. The camera moves like it knows what's coming.
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: cinematic sports photography, dramatic lighting, stadium atmosphere, 4k, film grain, epic composition, emotional

ambient_audio.style: Distant stadium crowd murmur, dramatic orchestral undertone, heartbeat tension, cinematic sports atmosphere
